name: Serial Devices DAT
description: Provide a list of connected serial devices which can be refreshed manually or at periodic intervals. A callback DAT is provided to react to addition/removal of devices.

parameters.name: Callbacks DAT
parameters.label: Callbacks DAT
parameters.description: Runs this script once for each change to the table. See [[serialdevicesDAT_Class]] for usage.

parameters.name: Usage
parameters.label: Usage
parameters.description: Specify which serial devices to report information about based on their availability.

parameters.name: Refresh Pulse
parameters.label: Refresh Pulse
parameters.description: Instantly poll for serial device changes and update the table.

parameters.name: Enable Polling
parameters.label: Enable Polling
parameters.description: While on, poll for serial device changes periodically and update the table.

parameters.name: Polling Time
parameters.label: Polling Time
parameters.description: Time in seconds to wait for the next poll.

_provenance.fact: scraped from the live Serial_Devices_DAT wiki page
